scope: Reusable UK auto-locksmith workflow definitions referenced by vehicles, platforms and decision rules
notes: Workflow objects prevent procedures being duplicated across multiple vehicle records.
A vehicle may reference a workflow only after its exact platform, immobiliser system and fitted hardware have been resolved.
Tool support, key compatibility and procedure confidence are evaluated independently.
Research-required objects must not be presented as confirmed workshop instructions.

workflow_mqb48_add_key_autel_analogue.title: MQB48 / MQB 4.5 Add Key — Autel IM508S — analogue or mono V850/NEC dashboard

immo_acquisition.reason: The completed workshop job successfully acquired immobiliser data through OBD from the analogue/mono dashboard route.

warnings: Generate the dealer key from the saved IMMO backup rather than relying on the standard Add Key routine to generate it.
Verify the saved IMMO backup before leaving the read routine.
Do not apply this exact route to a Virtual Cockpit or Active Info Display vehicle.

evidence.notes: Xhorse B5 Green Super Remote programmed and worked correctly using the saved-IMMO dealer-key route.

workflow_mqb48_immo_from_key_virtual_coc.title: MQB48 / MQB 4.5 IMMO acquisition from working key — Virtual Cockpit

immo_acquisition.reason: OBD immobiliser-data acquisition is not supported for this dashboard branch.

warnings: This object confirms the acquisition route only; it does not yet define a complete workshop-verified Add Key procedure.
Confirm tool support for the exact key-read or bench method before starting.

workflow_mqb48_akl.title: MQB48 / MQB 4.5 All Keys Lost
warnings: No complete workshop-verified MQB48 / MQB 4.5 all-keys-lost procedure has been recorded.
Do not convert the verified Add Key route into an AKL recommendation.

workflow_mqb5d_key_selection.title: MQB 5D compatible key selection
warnings: Key compatibility does not by itself confirm Add Key or AKL tool support.
Match frequency, button layout, part family and vehicle application before use.
